title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_manager.py (第 1 至 260 行，共 441 行) ---
   1 | """
   2 | 统一记忆管理器
   3 | 
   4 | MemoryManager 是阶段 1 重构新增的记忆编排入口，负责统一持有并协调：
   5 | - WorkingMemory：当前工作记忆
   6 | - EpisodicMemory：会话内结构化摘要
   7 | - LongTermMemory：跨会话持久化摘要
   8 | - MemoryRetriever：多层检索器
   9 | - CompressionEngine：上下文压缩引擎
  10 | 
  11 | 底层 memory_layers 仍保持轻量数据结构职责；ContextManager/AgentEngine 应逐步只通过
  12 | MemoryManager 访问记忆能力，减少分散编排逻辑。
  13 | """
  14 | 
  15 | from __future__ import annotations
  16 | 
  17 | import json
  18 | from pathlib import Path
  19 | from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
  20 | 
  21 | from core.compression_engine import CompressionEngine, CompressionStrategy, CompressionResult
  22 | from core.memory_layers import WorkingMemory, EpisodicMemory, LongTermMemory
  23 | from core.memory_items import MemoryItem, MemoryKind, MemoryRecallResult, RawObservation
  24 | from core.memory_models import SessionSummary
  25 | from core.memory_retrieval import MemoryRetriever
  26 | from core.memory_context_builder import MemoryContextBuilder
  27 | 
  28 | 
  29 | class MemoryManager:
  30 |     """
  31 |     统一记忆编排入口。
  32 | 
  33 |     该类不替代底层三层记忆的数据结构，而是提供稳定的高层 API：
  34 |     - add_message / save_summary
  35 |     - compress_messages
  36 |     - search / retrieve_by_file_path / retrieve_by_error_type
  37 |     - export_memories / import_memories
  38 |     - get_statistics / clear
  39 |     """
  40 | 
  41 |     def __init__(
  42 |         self,
  43 |         working_max_size: int = 20,
  44 |         episodic_max_size: int = 50,
  45 |         long_term_storage_dir: str = "memory/long_term",
  46 |         plan_manager: Any = None,
  47 |         enabled: bool = True,
  48 |         working_memory: Optional[WorkingMemory] = None,
  49 |         episodic_memory: Optional[EpisodicMemory] = None,
  50 |         long_term_memory: Optional[LongTermMemory] = None,
  51 |         compression_engine: Optional[CompressionEngine] = None,
  52 |     ):
  53 |         self.enabled = enabled
  54 |         self.working_memory = working_memory or WorkingMemory(max_size=working_max_size)
  55 |         self.episodic_memory = episodic_memory or EpisodicMemory(max_size=episodic_max_size)
  56 |         self.long_term_memory = long_term_memory or LongTermMemory(storage_dir=long_term_storage_dir)
  57 |         self.compression_engine = compression_engine or CompressionEngine(plan_manager=plan_manager)
  58 |         self.retriever = MemoryRetriever(
  59 |             self.working_memory,
  60 |             self.episodic_memory,
  61 |             self.long_term_memory,
  62 |         )
  63 |         self.context_builder = MemoryContextBuilder()
  64 | 
  65 |     def add_message(self, message: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
  66 |         """添加消息到工作记忆，返回被 FIFO 淘汰的消息。"""
  67 |         if not self.enabled:
  68 |             return None
  69 |         return self.working_memory.add(message)
  70 | 
  71 |     def reset_working_memory(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
  72 |         """用给定消息重建工作记忆。"""
  73 |         if not self.enabled:
  74 |             return
  75 |         self.working_memory.clear()
  76 |         for msg in messages:
  77 |             self.working_memory.add(msg)
  78 | 
  79 |     def save_summary(self, summary: SessionSummary) -> Optional[SessionSummary]:
  80 |         """
  81 |         保存摘要到情景记忆。
  82 | 
  83 |         如果情景记忆因容量限制淘汰旧摘要，则自动归档淘汰摘要到长期记忆。
  84 |         返回被归档的摘要；没有淘汰则返回 None。
  85 |         """
  86 |         if not self.enabled:
  87 |             return None
  88 | 
  89 |         evicted_summary = self.episodic_memory.add(summary)
  90 |         if evicted_summary:
  91 |             self.long_term_memory.store(evicted_summary)
  92 |         return evicted_summary
  93 | 
  94 |     def save_memory_item(self, item: MemoryItem) -> str:
  95 |         """保存标准 MemoryItem 到长期记忆。"""
  96 |         if not self.enabled:
  97 |             return ""
  98 |     ...
